summary: Amoxicillin remains recommended due to its effectiveness despite some guidelines recommending reduced use, especially suitable for patients at risk such as those with severe valvular disease combined with other cardiovascular issues impacting kidney function from current medication regimen. It provides a safe balance between covering common pathogens involved post-dental work without introducing additional toxicities seen with alternative antibiotics listed above which pose greater risks
